steps: "File dividend tax reclaim with Danske Bank Custody for DKK 153,600 excess withholding on Novo Nordisk (NOVO B)",
"Submit claim to Danish Tax Administration (SKAT) using online form referencing DK-NO treaty 15% rate vs. 25% withheld",
"Provide documentation: account statement, treaty certification, and proof of Norwegian tax residency for CLIENT03",
"Follow up with custodian within 30 days to ensure reclaim submission to Danish authorities"

references.title: Skat.dk – Claiming Refund of Danish Dividend Tax
